curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Patch commit 3ff02b0 is a merge commit merging fix branch 4e88b39 into mainline a4d8ab2. Only one source file changed: adm_program/modules/ecards/ecard_send.php. The fix adds an (int) cast to $value from $_POST['ecard_recipients'] before appending to $arrayUsers, which is later used in implode(',', $arrayUsers) inside a SQL IN clause. Sibling files ecard_preview.php and ecards.php were checked and do not contain the same SQL injection pattern. L3 hints now differentiate from L1/L2 by naming the ecard subsystem and greeting card sending context. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed from CWE-89, advisory description, and patch diff.
